name: extractor validator rejects a pattern whose usefulness_estimate is zero or six (outside the one-to-five range)
command: printf '[{"id":"p1","verbatim_quote":"x","usefulness_estimate":6}]\n' > patterns.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/validate-patterns.sh" --patterns patterns.json 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'usefulness_estimate' err.txt && grep -q 'p1' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
